title: Open the Smalls Overview HMI Screen
summary: Access the Smalls overview screen from the HMI to view the smalls system layout and the color-coded status of each part of the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to open the "Smalls" overview screen from the system HMI to view the smalls system layout and overall color-coded status display.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for accessing the ACB System overview screen.
Do not use this procedure for opening statistics, calculations, tipping station, or API control screens.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate on the HMI to open the "Smalls" overview screen and verify that the expected overview display appears.

system_preconditions: The HMI is available and the SMALLS access option is available on the screen being used.

visual_references.description: Smalls System Overview Screen showing the smalls system layout and color-coded status of each part of the system.
Related HMI overview screen artifact included in the packet; useful only as surrounding HMI context, not as the target screen for this procedure.
Related System HMI screen artifact included in the packet; useful only as surrounding HMI context.

steps.title: Go to the HMI with the SMALLS option
steps.purpose: Position the operator at the correct HMI location where the Smalls overview screen can be opened.
steps.instruction: Go to the system HMI where the SMALLS access option is available.
steps.expected_result: The operator is at an HMI screen where SMALLS can be selected.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI is accessible and the SMALLS option is available for selection.
steps.failure_condition: The HMI is not accessible or the SMALLS option is not available.

actions.label: Locate SMALLS access
actions.exact_action: Go to the HMI where the SMALLS access option is available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference the expected Smalls overview display that should be reachable after selecting SMALLS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the HMI cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the SMALLS access option is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.

steps.title: Press SMALLS
steps.purpose: Open the Smalls overview screen from the HMI.
steps.instruction: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting SMALLS opens the "Smalls" overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing SMALLS does not open the "Smalls" overview screen.

actions.label: Open Smalls overview
actions.exact_action: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use this figure as the target screen that should appear after pressing SMALLS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the Smalls overview screen does not open after pressing SMALLS.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.

steps.title: Verify the Smalls overview screen opens
steps.purpose: Confirm that the correct overview screen is displayed after navigation.
steps.instruction: Verify that the "Smalls" overview screen opens and displays the smalls system layout.
steps.expected_result: The displayed screen is the "Smalls" overview screen and it shows the smalls system layout.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shown matches the Smalls overview screen and includes the smalls system layout.
steps.failure_condition: A different screen appears or the smalls system layout is not shown.

actions.label: Confirm Smalls overview display
actions.exact_action: Verify that the "Smalls" overview screen opens and displays the smalls system layout.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Compare the displayed HMI screen to the Smalls system overview layout shown in Figure 4-4.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected layout is not shown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout.
The "Smalls" overview screen presents the layout of the smalls system.

steps.title: Confirm color-coded status is shown
steps.purpose: Verify that the overview screen provides the expected status display for each part of the system.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the screen shows a color-coded status for each part of the system.
steps.expected_result: The screen displays a color-coded status for each part of the system.
steps.healthy_condition: Color-coded status indications are visible across the parts of the system shown on the overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The expected color-coded status display is missing or incomplete.

actions.label: Check color-coded status
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the screen shows a color-coded status for each part of the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Review the overview screen for the color-coded status indications associated with each part of the smalls system.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected color-coded status display is not shown.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.

success_criteria: The "Smalls" overview screen opens after pressing SMALLS.
The screen shows the smalls system layout.
The screen shows a color-coded status for each part of the system.
healthy_conditions: The HMI is accessible and the SMALLS option is available.
The displayed screen includes the smalls system layout.
Color-coded status is visible for each part of the system.
failure_conditions: The Smalls overview screen does not open after pressing SMALLS.
The expected Smalls overview layout is not shown.
The expected color-coded status display is not shown.
escalation_guidance: Stop if the Smalls overview screen does not open after pressing SMALLS.
Escalate if the expected layout is not shown.
Escalate if the expected color-coded status display is not shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary reference image for the target Smalls overview screen, including system layout and color-coded status.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen. The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.
